description: Sanitized representative MiniMax analysis wrapper with canonical assessment JSON inside a content array text part.

expectedAnalysis.summary: The Full Stack AI Engineer Assessment asks the candidate to build an AI-powered full-stack document review app with backend APIs, retrieval-grounded AI, React UX, reliability evidence, deployment thinking, and clear deliverables.

sections.title: Backend requirements
sections.summary: Expose REST APIs for authentication, document creation, analysis, chat, retrieval, persistence, and JWT ownership checks.
sections.sourceQuote: The backend must expose a REST API for authentication, document creation, analysis, chat, and source retrieval.

sections.title: Frontend requirements
sections.summary: Build a React reviewer workspace with source intake, briefing, chat, answer cards, loading and error states, and readable AI output.
sections.sourceQuote: The frontend must be implemented in React and provide a user-friendly flow.

sections.title: Deliverables
sections.summary: Provide a runnable Git repository and README covering architecture, AI design, data flow, privacy, reliability, deployment, and trade-offs.
sections.sourceQuote: The candidate must deliver a Git repository with runnable local setup instructions and a README.

entities.name: Full Stack AI Engineer Assessment
entities.description: A sanitized assessment fixture for reviewer workflow validation.

requirements.text: Expose REST API endpoints for authentication, document creation, analysis, chat, source retrieval, persistence, and JWT ownership checks.
requirements.sourceQuote: The backend must expose a REST API for authentication, document creation, analysis, chat, and source retrieval.

requirements.text: Normalize model responses, combine document-level analysis with retrieval-grounded chat, cite supporting evidence, and fail safely for insufficient evidence.
requirements.sourceQuote: The AI path must combine document-level analysis with retrieval-grounded chat.

requirements.text: Implement a React reviewer flow with source intake, review briefing, starter questions, chat input, answer cards, inspectable evidence, and resilient states.
requirements.sourceQuote: The frontend must be implemented in React and provide a user-friendly flow.

deliverables.text: Submit a Git repository with runnable local setup instructions and a README explaining architecture, AI design, data flow, privacy decisions, reliability strategy, deployment approach, and trade-offs.
deliverables.sourceQuote: The candidate must deliver a Git repository with runnable local setup instructions and a README.

risks.text: AI reliability, hallucination handling, privacy-safe logging, conversion failures, retrieval misses, provider failures, and network failures need explicit tests and safe recovery behavior.
risks.sourceQuote: The implementation should fail safely when conversion, retrieval, provider, or network operations fail.

uncertainties: The fixture describes expectations but does not prescribe a specific database or cloud topology.
recommendedQuestions: What backend requirements does the assessment specify?
What frontend UX requirements should be implemented?
What deliverables must the candidate provide?
